subcodes.first_line: O singular luminary! May God increase thy attraction to the divine fragrances. Place thy trust in God and rely upon Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الفریده النوراء زادک الله انجذابا بنفحات الله توکلی علی الله و اعتمدی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @love of God
